company.name: Janux Therapeutics
company.subtitle: TRACTr tumor-activated T cell engager platform | JANX007 PSMA mCRPC Ph1 | JANX008 EGFR Ph1 | Merck + BMS deals

market.notes: PSMA-targeted tumor-activated T cell engager. Phase 1a dose escalation complete. Phase 1b enrolling taxane-naive. 109 patients treated. Early data: 78% PSA30 decline at 0.1mg, 100% at 0.2mg. CRS low-grade (1-2) and Cycle 1 only. TRACTr masking minimizes systemic toxicity. Stock crashed 50% Feb 2026 on limited Phase 1b disclosure — market wanted more. Analysts estimate $1.5B+ peak in chemo-refractory, multi-blockbuster in earlier lines.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~300K new prostate/yr; ~55K mCSPC + ~45K mCRPC on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, PCF.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~345K new prostate/yr; ~110K on ARPi/chemo/PARPi per EUROCARE.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~200K on-tx; Japan high incidence post-PSA screening expansion.

us.wtpPct.note: ~70% -- ARPi (Xtandi/Erleada/Nubeqa) mCSPC SOC; Medicare Part D + VA cover; 340B strong at academic.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~52% -- NICE + G-BA approved all ARPi; France ASMR III; ADT generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan full reimb, China NRDL enza/apa; EM use ADT + docetaxel.

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: ARPi $180K (45% pts) + Pluvicto $240K (8%) + Lynparza/Talzenna $175K (7%) + ADT+chemo $25K (40%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% US; ADT leuprolide generic <$3K/yr.

penPct.note: ~60% peak -- ARPi intensification 1L mCSPC reached 75% eligible; Pluvicto + PARPi (HRR+) extend 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: PSMA-TRACTr mCRPC post-ARPi+Pluvicto; ~35K US 2L+ mCRPC; Ph1 data Sep 2024 impressive PSA responses; launch 2029 ~30% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$225K/yr projected; anchor to Pluvicto course $250K + Talzenna $230K; oral+SC convenience premium TBD.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- Pluvicto $42K/dose + Xtandi $13K/mo precedent; TRACTr differentiated safety vs bispecific TCE (Rockwell class).

eu.reachPct.note: ~22% EU5 mCRPC post-Pluvicto; EMA filing 2029+; NICE TA875 Pluvicto 2023 precedent.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~32% -- NICE/G-BA post-ARPi mCRPC reimbursed; PSMA testing adoption growing.

row.reachPct.note: ~12% ROW; Japan Pluvicto PMDA 2024; China PSMA testing early.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan NHI novel mCRPC broad; China NRDL targeted expanding.

assets.name: JANX008 — EGFR-TRACTr (solid tumors)
assets.stage: Phase 1 (dose escalation complete, expansion cohorts initiated)

indications.name: CRC + SCCHN + NSCLC + RCC + PDAC + TNBC (EGFR)

market.notes: EGFR-targeted TRACTr across multiple solid tumors. Phase 1a complete, expansion cohorts started. EGFR is validated but historically undruggable with T cell engagers due to on-target toxicity. TRACTr masking may solve this — if so, massive TAM across CRC, NSCLC, SCCHN, PDAC, TNBC.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~155K new CRC/yr US; ~55K metastatic/advanced on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, ACS.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~215K new CRC/yr; ~70K on systemic per EUROCARE-6.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~320K on-tx; China NCC reports ~560K new CRC/yr (highest globally).

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- FOLFOX/FOLFIRI + bev/cetux/pani SOC; Krazati/Lumakras KRAS G12C; Keytruda MSI-H 1L; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE + G-BA approved all tgt rx; France ASMR III-IV; bevacizumab biosim widely used.

row.wtpPct.note: ~16% -- Japan J-DPC full coverage; China NRDL cetux + bev; EM chemo backbone.

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: bev/cetux+chemo $125K (50% pts) + KRAS G12Ci $195K (5%) + pembro MSI-H $180K (5%) + chemo alone $30K (40%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% US; bev biosim ~50% off list.

penPct.note: ~50% peak -- tgt rx tied to biomarkers (KRAS G12C 4%, MSI-H 5%, BRAF V600E 8%, HER2 3%); broad chemo base.

us.reachPct.note: EGFR-TRACTr solid tumors NSCLC/CRC EGFR-amp/mut; Ph1 dose-esc 2025; launch 2030+ ~15% reach, competes with Amivantamab/Lazcluze combos.

us.priceK.note: ~$220K/yr; anchor to Rybrevant $210K + bispecific class; TRACTr differentiation supports premium.

us.wtpPct.note: ~45% -- EGFR testing ubiquitous; Amivantamab $18K/mo precedent; Medicare Part B infused TCE.

eu.reachPct.note: ~18% EU5 EGFR solid; EMA bispecific precedent Rybrevant 2021; NICE TA980 amivantamab 2024.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~25% -- NICE + G-BA EGFR-mut lung broadly reimb; EGFR-amp CRC narrower.

row.reachPct.note: ~10% ROW; Japan EGFR-mut NSCLC dominant (~50% vs 15% Western); China EGFR testing high.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan NHI EGFR broad; China NRDL EGFR-TKI entrenched.

market.notes: Adaptive Immune Response Modulator targeting CD19 for autoimmune diseases. First patient dosed. ARM platform = T cell modulation for autoimmunity. If it works: off-the-shelf alternative to CAR-T for lupus/RA.

us.patientsK.note: Lupus Foundation of America: ~300K US SLE; 90% female; African American 3x risk; CDC 2018 registry data.

eu.patientsK.note: EULAR SLE registry: ~350K EU27+UK; SLEDAI/BILAG severity scoring; ~30% lupus nephritis subset.

row.patientsK.note: Global ex-US/EU ~4M; Asia Pacific highest age-standardized prevalence; lupus nephritis more aggressive.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- Benlysta (IV + SC) Medicare Part B/D; Saphnelo (anifrolumab) commercial; Lupkynis LN covered.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~38% -- EMA approved Benlysta/Saphnelo/Lupkynis; NICE restrictive; HCQ + MMF backbone standard.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- HCQ + steroids + MMF/AZA generics dominate; Japan Benlysta reimbursed.

us.priceK.note: Blended $45K: Benlysta $40K + Saphnelo $65K + Lupkynis $90K (LN) + HCQ/MMF generic $3K backbone; rituximab off-label.

eu.priceK.note: ~$22K blended -- Benlysta net ~$25K + generic backbone; anifrolumab ~$40K net.

penPct.note: ~25% peak -- biologic cycle-through (Benlysta -> Saphnelo -> CAR-T pipeline); steroid-sparing driver.

us.reachPct.note: CD19-TRACTr SLE/autoimmune; ~330K US moderate-severe SLE + lupus nephritis; CAR-T competition (ALLO-329, Cabaletta); Ph1 2026 readouts gate reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$180K/yr or finite course $350K; autoimmune CD19 depletion pricing novel, CAR-T $480K ref (Kymriah).

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% -- Benlysta $40K/yr + Saphnelo $40K benchmark; off-the-shelf CD19 TCE vs autologous CAR-T convenience premium.

eu.reachPct.note: ~15% EU5 SLE; EMA autoimmune CD19 path undefined; NICE TA397 Benlysta SOC.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~22% -- G-BA Benlysta/Saphnelo precedent; autoimmune CAR-T EU access nascent.

row.reachPct.note: <8% ROW; Japan NHI SLE biologic growing; China SLE CAR-T POC but access narrow.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan PMDA Benlysta SLE reimb; China NRDL SLE biologic limited.

market.notes: TRACIr = CD28 costimulatory arm. Designed to combo with JANX007 TRACTr for enhanced T cell activation. PSMA-TRACIr + JANX007 = dual T cell activation in prostate cancer.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~300K new prostate/yr; ~55K mCSPC + ~45K mCRPC on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, PCF.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~345K new prostate/yr; ~110K on ARPi/chemo/PARPi per EUROCARE.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~200K on-tx; Japan high incidence post-PSA screening expansion.

us.wtpPct.note: ~70% -- ARPi (Xtandi/Erleada/Nubeqa) mCSPC SOC; Medicare Part D + VA cover; 340B strong at academic.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~52% -- NICE + G-BA approved all ARPi; France ASMR III; ADT generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan full reimb, China NRDL enza/apa; EM use ADT + docetaxel.

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: ARPi $180K (45% pts) + Pluvicto $240K (8%) + Lynparza/Talzenna $175K (7%) + ADT+chemo $25K (40%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% US; ADT leuprolide generic <$3K/yr.

penPct.note: ~60% peak -- ARPi intensification 1L mCSPC reached 75% eligible; Pluvicto + PARPi (HRR+) extend 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: PSMA-TRACIr next-gen immune recruitment (TRACIr platform); preclinical/IND 2026; very early, reach <5% near-term, optionality only.

us.priceK.note: ~$200K/yr projected; anchor to PSMA-TRACTr; novel platform premium unconfirmed.

us.wtpPct.note: ~30% speculative -- TRACIr mechanism unproven in clinic; payor coverage TBD post-Ph2.

market.notes: Merck: strategic collaboration for TRACTr candidates — $10M milestone received 2025. BMS: exclusive worldwide license for novel program — development candidate nominated Mar 2026. TROP2-TRACTr advancing preclinically. Platform generates partnership value.

us.patientsK.note: ~30K US NSCLC w/o targetable driver (wild-type); IO+chemo SOC 1L. Source: NCI SEER + KEYNOTE-189 enrollment.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~45K driver-negative NSCLC; ESMO NGS reflex excludes drivers.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~180K driver-negative; smoking-associated heavy in APAC/EM.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- Keytruda+chemo 1L (KN-189/407), Tecentriq+chemo, Libtayo; NCCN Cat 1; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~48% -- NICE + G-BA approved pembro+chemo + atezo+chemo 1L; France ASMR III.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan PMDA full; China NRDL tislelizumab/sintilimab + chemo.

us.priceK.note: Blended $135K: pembro+chemo $175K (50% pts) + atezo/cemi+chemo $165K (15%) + IO+CTLA4 $210K (10%) + chemo alone $30K (25%).

row.priceK.note: ~$30K blended; China NRDL IO <$30K drives mix.

penPct.note: ~55% peak -- IO+chemo saturated 1L; LAG3 + TIGIT + PD1xVEGF (ivonescimab) 1L combos extend 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: Merck + BMS partnered programs; 0.5% reach reflects undisclosed targets, royalty/milestone model

eu.reachPct.note: EU reach 0.3% of 45K; EMA pathway at preclinical

eu.wtpPct.note: EU drug-specific WTP 7% -- EU access TBD; EMA pathway unclear at stage

eu.priceK.note: EU net $110K/yr post-HTA (~50-60% of US list typical)

row.reachPct.note: ROW reach 0.1% of 180K; ex-US/EU access lags by years at preclinical

row.wtpPct.note: ROW drug-specific WTP 3% -- ROW access limited to Japan + select APAC at launch

row.priceK.note: ROW blended $40K/yr -- Japan near EU, emerging markets lower via tiered pricing

mega_bear.narrative: TRACTr platform fails to differentiate — JANX007 efficacy insufficient in mCRPC
events: X JANX007 Phase 1b mCRPC shows limited durability — responses short-lived
X JANX008 EGFR expansion fails in CRC/NSCLC — on-target toxicity despite masking
X ARM autoimmune platform unproven — CAR-T dominates
-> $950M market cap with $850M cash — platform worth nothing

bear.narrative: JANX007 shows signal but modest — niche mCRPC only + JANX008 slow to mature
events: ~ JANX007 mCRPC data encouraging but not best-in-class
~ JANX008 expansion data mixed — some tumor types respond, others not
X ARM autoimmune early data underwhelms
-> Platform validated as proof of concept but commercial path uncertain

base.narrative: JANX007 validates TRACTr in mCRPC + JANX008 shows activity in 2+ tumor types + partnerships deliver
events: V JANX007 Phase 1b mCRPC data strong — registrational path identified
V JANX008 EGFR expansion shows meaningful responses in CRC + SCCHN
V CD19-ARM Phase 1 autoimmune: clean safety + target engagement
V Merck + BMS programs advancing — platform validated by Big Pharma

bull.narrative: TRACTr platform breakthrough — T cell engagers finally work in solid tumors — multi-blockbuster
events: V JANX007 mCRPC blockbuster $1.5B+ — best-in-class PSMA-TCE
V JANX008 EGFR validated across 3+ solid tumor types — $3B+ peak
V TRACTr masking solves CRS problem — paradigm shift for T cell engagers
V ARM autoimmune platform generates $1B+ in partnerships

psychedelic_bull.narrative: TRACTr = the bispecific platform that finally cracks solid tumors — Merck/BMS acquires at $100+
events: V JANX007 + JANX008 = two blockbusters, 5+ approved indications
V TRACTr/TRACIr/ARM = 3 platforms across oncology + autoimmune
V Platform generates 10+ clinical candidates
V Merck or BMS acquires for $10-15B to own tumor-activated immunotherapy

lastData.title: 109 patients treated JANX007 mCRPC, JANX008 expansion initiated, CD19-ARM dosed
points: Phase 1a: 78% PSA30 at 0.1mg, 100% at 0.2mg, 90% PSA decline observed
CRS low-grade (1-2), Cycle 1 only — TRACTr masking works
JANX008 EGFR: Phase 1a complete, expansion cohorts initiated across solid tumors
JANX011 CD19-ARM: first patient dosed for autoimmune diseases
BMS collaboration: development candidate nominated Mar 2026
Merck: $10M milestone (first patient dosed in lead collab program)
Stock crashed from $36 to $13 on Feb 2026 data — limited Phase 1b disclosure
Analyst consensus: Strong Buy, median PT $53.60 (4x current price)

nextCatalyst.title: JANX007 Phase 1b mCRPC data maturation + JANX008 expansion data
thresholds: JANX007 Phase 1b: deeper PSA data + radiographic responses in taxane-naive
JANX008: expansion cohort efficacy signals across tumor types
JANX011 CD19-ARM: Phase 1 safety/PK early data

risks: Stock at $13 after 65% crash — market lost confidence in Phase 1b data
$950M market cap with $850M cash = paying ~$100M for entire platform
T cell engagers in solid tumors have historically failed (Amgen, others)
JANX007 Feb 2026 update was thin — Phase 1b durability/response rate unknown
JANX008 EGFR expansion data not yet disclosed — could disappoint
CRS masking may not hold at therapeutic doses in larger populations
ARM autoimmune platform is entirely preclinical-to-Phase 1
Competition from ADCs, bispecifics, radioligands in same indications
Merck and BMS may deprioritize collaboration programs

catalysts.title: PSMA-TRACIr combination with JANX007 Phase 1 start
catalysts._rationale: IND-enabling studies underway, clinical trials expected to begin in second half 2026 per R&D Day presentation

catalysts.title: JANX008 EGFR-TRACTr solid tumors dose expansion
JANX011 CD19-ARM autoimmune Phase 1 initial data
catalysts._rationale: Management expects initial clinical update from Phase 1 study by year-end 2026 per Q4 2025 earnings
